app.title: Taskimon
app.supabaseRequiredSubtitle: Set up Supabase before using the app
app.supabaseRequiredBody: Create a .env or .env.production file, then run SQL migrations in supabase/migrations/

auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured yet. Create .env from .env.example and run SQL migrations in supabase/migrations/
auth.signInSuccess: Signed in. Data loaded from database.
auth.signUpSuccessVerifyEmail: Sign-up complete. Check your email and confirm before signing in.
auth.needBirthDate: Please select a complete birth date.
auth.mustBe18: You must be at least 18 years old to play.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Enter your signup email. Your password will be reset to your birth date (DDMMYYYY).
auth.resetPasswordDone: Password reset complete. Use your birth date as password (DDMMYYYY, e.g. 03011996).
auth.taglineLogin: Log in to start raising your pet
auth.taglineSignup: Create an account and begin your Taskimon adventure

home.featureEvolution: Raise your pet -> evolve Egg -> Baby -> Adult
home.activityFormula: Score = clicks + typing/10 · cap {{maxPerHour}} evolution points/hr

missions.title: Daily / Weekly Missions
missions.daily_play_1h: Keep your pet active on-screen for 1 hour

friends.title: Friends
friends.hint: Enter a friend code and send a request. If they already requested you, it will auto-accept.
friends.requestAlreadySent: Request already sent. Waiting for response.
friends.requestSentOrAlreadyFriends: Request already sent or already friends.
friends.requestCannotSendCheckCode: Cannot send request. Please check friend code.
friends.requestSent: Friend request sent to {{username}}. Waiting for acceptance.

chat.title: Chat with Friends
chat.startBySelectingFriend: Select a friend to start chatting.

profile.title: Profile
profile.loginToView: Log in to view your profile, or select a friend from the Friends tab.

pet.hatchEvolutionHint: Evolution starts in the egg — click and type on your desktop to reach {{points}} points.
pet.hatchReadyHint: The egg is ready to hatch!
pet.needRaiseBeforeBattle: Hatch and raise your pet before battling.
pet.needRaiseBeforeBattleHp: Hatch and raise your pet (HP >= 10) before battling.
pet.evolveRequirementHint: Requires evolution >= {{points}} and at least {{hours}} hours raised.
pet.noCloudPetForFriend: Friend has no pet in cloud.

battle.title: Battle
battle.noOpenRooms: No rooms open yet. Create the first one.
battle.leaveRoomConfirmBody: Leaving counts as a forfeit if battle is active and exits the waiting room.
battle.pickOpponentHint: Select an opponent from members currently waiting in room.
battle.waitForOthers: Wait for other players to join before starting a duel.
battle.waitForHost: Waiting for host to start duel...
battle.ultimateHint: Attack or defend to build ultimate energy.
battle.friendSelectLabel: Choose friend (must be logged in + cloud sync)

modal.subtitleFledSelf: This counts as a battle loss
modal.subtitleRetry: Try again in the next duel

clearMyData.title: Clear My Data
clearMyData.description: Delete only this account's game data{{usernameSuffix}} without affecting other players.
clearMyData.deleteList: Delete: pet, items, missions, activity, battle history (this account)
clearMyData.keepList: Keep: login account, friends, chat (this account)
clearMyData.confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all your game data?
clearMyData.done: Your data has been cleared. Starting fresh.

systemReset.title: System Reset
systemReset.description: Reset all players' game data across the system. Login, friends, and chat remain.
systemReset.deleteList: Delete: all pets, items, missions, activity, battle history, and battle rooms
systemReset.keepList: Keep: all login accounts, friends, and chats
systemReset.confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all players' game data?
systemReset.done: System reset complete. Game data has been reset for all users.

tray.title: Taskimon
tray.loginToSeePetStatus: Log in to view pet status

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Open your email and click the verification link, or disable Confirm email in Supabase.
errors.userAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try logging in instead.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.newPasswordSameAsOld: New password must be different from the old password.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
errors.noBirthDateOnAccount: This account has no birth date on file. Contact support.
